positive: A majestic, stylized arrangement of bioluminescent celestial flora and fauna, dominated by glowing crescent moons, nebula patterns, and gracefully looping vines. The composition should be highly symmetrical and centered, featuring stylized dream creatures (like ethereal, geometric owls and hummingbirds) silhouetted against a deep indigo and sapphire cosmic background. Use a sophisticated art deco aesthetic mixed with modern psychedelic bioluminescence. Strong contrast between the deep cosmic voids and the bright, saturated cyan, magenta, and gold highlights. The overall effect must be scalable and pop art-suitable for apparel printing, with clean lines and distinct, graphic elements. Vector illustration quality, flat depth, screen-print ready.
negative: blurry, noisy, grainy, artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, signature, watermark, text, logo, trademark, low detail, realistic photography, portrait, messy, poorly drawn
